revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Unbalanced}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Unbalanced | class = ambox-unbalanced | type = content | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | image = [[File:Unbalanced scales.svg|50x40px|class=skin-invert|link=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''may be [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view#Undue weight|unbalanced]] toward certain viewpoints'''. | fix = Please [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve the article] by adding information on neglected viewpoints, or discuss the issue on the [[:{{NAMESPACE}} talk:{{PAGENAME}}{{#if: {{{talk|}}}|#{{{talk}}}|}}|talk page]]. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing more viewpoints }}<!--{{Unbalanced}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- PLEASE ADD THIS TEMPLATE'S CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = Unbalanced | class = ambox-unbalanced | type = content | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | image = [[File:Unbalanced scales.svg|50x40px|class=skin-invert|link=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''may be [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view#Undue weight|unbalanced]] toward certain viewpoints'''. | fix = Please [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve the article] by adding information on neglected viewpoints, or discuss the issue on the [[:{{NAMESPACE}} talk:{{PAGENAME}}{{#if: {{{talk|}}}|#{{{talk}}}|}}|talk page]]. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing more viewpoints }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
